{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Arelius power
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Cassias]] can run webs of [[Arelius power]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c12">''Blackflame'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
